class.name: Pasture3DLayerStack
class.brief_description: An ordered stack of non-destructive height-map layers for a terrain.
class.description: Index 0 is the bottom (the dense "Base" layer); higher indices composite over lower ones. This is the editor-side source of truth: edits target the active layer, then the stack is composited down into the runtime [Pasture3DRegion] images. A terrain with no stack behaves exactly as before, so this resource is always optional and is held by [Pasture3DData].
